mappings.reason: Collect Command-Line Audit Logs directly captures privileged session activity from administrative terminals (PowerShell, BASH, remote terminals), satisfying IAM-23's session user activity recording requirement.

Collect Detailed Audit Logs requires username, timestamp, source/destination addresses for sensitive data assets, supporting session activity recording for privileged access to trusted data environments.

Dedicated Computing Resources for Administrative Work segments administrative tasks from the primary network and restricts internet access, supporting IAM-23's tunnelling restriction to untrusted data environments.
